articles.title: America already tried permanent daylight saving time. It lasted less than a year. Could it work now? - AP News
articles.description: The twice-yearly changing of the clocks could be a thing of the past if legislation currently in Congress that calls for permanent daylight time makes it through. But even as annoying as some find the back-and-forth of the time shift in the spring and the fal…
articles.content:
NEW YORK (AP) Its an idea whose time, as it were, may have come again.

articles.title: Sen. Warren says Trump's CFPB overhaul has cost Americans $26.5 billion - CNBC
articles.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren says the Trump administration's rollback of CFPB rules and enforcement has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far.
articles.content: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., said Thursday that the Trump administration's overhaul of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far, the latest Democratic… [+2188 chars]
